summary: Minor finding from round 0 fixed: weak string-in-string assertion replaced with structured assert_any_call. Major finding remains unaddressed: test_remove_by_prefix_fallback_on_parse_error still mocks _list_firewall_rules_by_prefix directly instead of raising a subprocess exception, so the exception-handling branch in _list_firewall_rules_by_prefix (lines 551-553) is untested.

findings.issue: The test mocks _list_firewall_rules_by_prefix(return_value=[]) to trigger the fallback path in remove_firewall_rules(), but the TDD anchor specifies mocking subprocess.run to raise an exception. The except branch in _list_firewall_rules_by_prefix (lines 551-553: `except Exception as e: logger.warning(...); return []`) is never exercised. If that branch were deleted or the exception re-raised, this test would not catch the regression.
